name: Credit Suisse X-Links Silver Shares Covered Call ETNs due April 21 2033
summary: Credit Suisse X-Links Silver Shares Covered Call ETNs due April 21 2033 is an exchange-traded note providing exposure to a covered call strategy on silver prices. The ETN seeks to generate income from the premiums received from writing call options on silver. The notes are issued by Credit Suisse.
